top.name: Fate Weaver
top.rules_text: Prepare a glyph within 4. Whenever any spell is cast within 3 tiles of it, draw 1 card. Lasts 3 turns.

bottom.name: Glyph Storm
bottom.rules_text: Prepare a glyph on every unoccupied tile within 2 of you. Each deals 2 damage when an enemy enters.

upgrades.description: The weaver also pays mana. The storm bites harder.

changes.value: Prepare a glyph within 4. When any spell is cast within 3 of it, draw 1 and gain 1 mana. Lasts 3 turns.
Prepare a glyph on every unoccupied tile within 2 of you. Each deals 3 when an enemy enters.

upgrades.description: Destiny Weaver: also banks Weave on each trigger.

changes.value: Prepare a glyph within 4. When any spell casts within 3, draw 1, gain 1 mana, gain 1 Weave. Lasts 3 turns.
Prepare glyphs on every unoccupied tile within 2. Each deals 3 and slows when an enemy enters.

upgrades.description: Loom of Fate: triggers on ally spells too, and is permanent.

changes.value: Prepare a permanent glyph. When any spell casts within 4, draw 1, gain 1 mana, gain 1 Weave.
Prepare glyphs on every unoccupied tile within 3. Each deals 3 and slows when an enemy enters.

upgrades.description: The Great Loom: every nearby spell weaves a new glyph.

changes.value: Permanent glyph. When any spell casts within 4: draw 1, gain 1 mana, 1 Weave, and spawn a 3-damage glyph nearby.

upgrades.description: Glyph Cataclysm: a board-filling, Naming storm.

changes.value: Prepare reusable glyphs on every unoccupied tile within 3. Each deals 5 and Names for 1 turn on entry.
